---
title: "Interface"
---

This section of the documentation focuses on how the interface is
implemented. It is split into the following documents:

- The [Inputs](inputs.qmd) accepted by `check-datapackage`.
- The [Outputs](outputs.qmd), including the structure of the `Issue`
  class and different output formats.
- The [Command Line Interface](cli.qmd) that forms the main entry point.
- The [Configuration settings](config.qmd) as a TOML file and Python
  `Config` class.
- The [Python functions](python.qmd) that contain the Python code that
  powers the CLI commands.
